name: lazysnap-monorepo
description: Monorepo for @lazysnap/* — image loading with observability, retry, and blur-up

scripts.build: npm run build --prefix packages/core && npm run build --prefix packages/react && npm run build --prefix packages/angular
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix packages/core && npm install --prefix packages/react && npm install --prefix packages/angular
scripts.clean: npm run clean --prefix packages/core && npm run clean --prefix packages/react && npm run clean --prefix packages/angular
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix packages/core && npm run typecheck --prefix packages/react && npm run typecheck --prefix packages/angular
